headline: Microchip Technology Deepens Aerospace Role With Class Y And Armenia Approval
summary: Microchip Technology expanded QML MIL-PRF-38535 certification at its Nantes facility to include Class Y for high reliability aerospace and defense products. The company also received a key U.S. export license approval to support advanced technology development activities in Armenia. For investors watching NasdaqGS:MCHP, these updates speak directly to Microchip Technology's role in mission critical markets rather than short term trading moves. The stock last closed at $95.24 and is up 7.8%...
